notable_excerpts: 98% of the energy used at plants has been from renewable sources.
We are there in all the alternate fuels. And of course, slowly and steadily, these alternate fuels will become more popular, especially LNG is expected to become more popular.

Our commitment to responsible growth has always been rooted in strong governance, transparency and ethical leadership.
Eicher Motors has won the Golden Peacock Award for Excellence in Corporate Governance 2025.

chain_of_thought: The transcript highlights significant efforts in renewable energy usage and alternative fuels, indicating strong environmental initiatives. Social aspects are addressed through community engagement and supply chain excellence, though less extensively. Governance is robust, with awards for corporate governance and a focus on transparency and ethics.
weaknesses: Limited specific details on social initiatives
